description: Final integration pass - ensure all new components are properly wired together, all imports resolve, the build is clean, and everything works as a cohesive whole.
steps: Run npx tsc -b --noEmit and fix any TypeScript errors that may have accumulated across the previous features.
Run npx vite build and ensure the production build succeeds without warnings.
Verify all new Pexels image IDs (from FEAT-002) return HTTP 200 using curl.

Read src/App.tsx and verify: (a) WhatWeSew component is imported and rendered in the correct position, (b) Analytics tracker initialization is present, (c) All section IDs referenced by analytics exist in the DOM.
Read src/components/AddDesignPanel.tsx and verify the Analytics tab is properly integrated with the correct tab type and conditional rendering.
Read SUPABASE_SETUP.md and verify the new site_analytics table SQL is present with proper RLS policies.
Ensure the src/main.tsx provider tree is correct and no contexts are missing.
acceptance_criteria: npx tsc -b --noEmit passes with zero errors
All Pexels image URLs return HTTP 200
All new components are properly imported and rendered in App.tsx
SUPABASE_SETUP.md is complete with analytics table SQL
No orphaned imports or dead code
